title: What is account warm-up?
body: It is the period when the account builds history and trust before scaling ad spend. Keep spend gradual and avoid abrupt changes to billing or IP.

title: What is a contingency budget?
body: A budget reserve to absorb auction volatility or A/B tests without pausing critical campaigns.

title: Lander and landing page
body: The lander is where traffic lands after the click. It must align with platform policy and the ad (consistent messaging).
